_publications._publicationTitle: Nilotinib is more potent than imatinib for treating plexiform neurofibroma in vitro and in vivo.

_contextSnippet: All animals tolerated xenografting and treatments well without visible signs of toxicity and gross abnormalities. General conditions of mice were also compatible among the untreated and the two treated groups.
resourceName: athymic nude mice (female, nu/nu Balb/c, 6 weeks, 20 g)
details: All animals tolerated xenografting and treatments well without visible signs of toxicity and gross abnormalities. Peak plasma nilotinib concentration was 6.6±1.1 µM
